evidence_note: MBS downloads page listed 20260701_MBSONLINE_IMAP.TXT and 20260701_MBSONLINE_DESC.TXT with 28 May 2026 file update notes.
recommended_action: Manually download descriptor and item-map files into data/raw_live/au_mbs/, snapshot checksums, then extend parser to TXT layout before mirroring any raw file.

status_label: PBS API/CSV is current distribution path
evidence_note: PBS API page states full PBS Schedule data are exposed through REST endpoints, downloadable in JSON and CSV, updated on the first day of every month; public API is rate-limited.
recommended_action: Use API CSV files or selected public API endpoints with one-request-per-twenty-seconds guard and preserve schedule-code metadata.

evidence_note: CMS CLFS files page listed 26CLABQ3 for CY 2026 Q3, updated for July 2026, with 2,206 records.
recommended_action: Download 26CLABQ3 locally, avoid committing CPT long descriptors, and parse only permitted payment/rate fields into derived outputs.

status_label: CY 2026 PFS RVU26C verified for local enrichment

evidence_note: CMS ASP pricing page listed July 2026 Medicare Part B Payment Limit Files and July 2026 NDC-HCPCS Crosswalk as final files dated 06/17/2026.
recommended_action: Download July 2026 payment-limit file and crosswalk locally, snapshot both, parse payment limits, and treat coverage as separate from pricing.
